meaning: Page Description Language,页面描述语言
examples: Or he might fall to a rebellion in his People of Freedom (PdL) party.
The PdL is still the biggest party in parliament, with around 250 of the 630 seats in the lower house.
Mr Fini did not need to press home his advantage to spell out that the PdL can no longer count on winning a majority.
In the long term, no doubt, Mr Fini still aspires to the PdL leadership.
Mr Berlusconi recently chose the PdL's candidate for a key governorship without consulting its officials.
